## Public API

### `lithos_loom.cli._github_metadata`
- class `GithubMetadataError` ‚Äî Raised when the CLI cannot complete a project-context mutation.
- class `NoteMutationResult` ‚Äî Outcome of a metadata-mutation round-trip.
- def `validate_github_repo` ‚Äî Return ``value`` if it matches ``owner/name``, else raise.
- def `extract_github_repos` ‚Äî Return the ``owner/name`` repos this project maps.
- def `is_github_watching`
- def `extract_exclude_labels` ‚Äî Return the GH-label names this project excludes at import time.
- def `extract_exclude_authors` ‚Äî Return the GH author logins this project excludes at import time.
- def `mutate_project_context_metadata` ‚Äî Apply ``mutator`` to a project-context doc's metadata and CAS-write.

### `lithos_loom.cli._github_tag_migration`
- class `MigrationItem` ‚Äî Per-doc outcome of the tag‚Üímetadata migration.
- def `migrate_github_tags` ‚Äî Migrate every project-context doc carrying legacy github tags.

### `lithos_loom.cli._project_import_bulk`
- class `ImportPlan` ‚Äî Validated, parsed, ready-to-execute bulk import.
- class `TasksOnlyPreflightError` ‚Äî Raised by :func:`check_tasks_only_preflight` for tasks-only mode failures.
- class `PartialImportError` ‚Äî Raised by :func:`create_tasks` on mid-batch failure (E1).
- def `validate_import_flags` ‚Äî Validate the new --tasks-only / --no-tasks / --force-tasks / --slug combos.
- def `resolve_default_slug_from_stem` ‚Äî Derive a default slug from the source file stem, stripping the ``project-`` prefix if present.
- def `stem_was_prefix_stripped` ‚Äî Whether the ``project-`` prefix-strip applied. Used by --dry-run output.
- def `render_validation_report` ‚Äî Format every validation error as a single multi-line report.
- def `render_dry_run_plan` ‚Äî Format the dry-run plan with NO CHANGES MADE markers at start AND end.
- def `render_typo_hint` ‚Äî Return a "did you mean:" suffix listing slugs within edit distance ‚â§ 2.
- def `check_tasks_only_preflight` ‚Äî Verify the project exists and (if frontmatter has lithos_id) it matches.
- def `force_tasks_cleanup` ‚Äî Cancel every OPEN task in ``existing_tasks``. Returns count cancelled.
- def `create_tasks` ‚Äî Create all tasks per ``plans``. Returns count created on success.

### `lithos_loom.cli._regenerate_done`
- def `collect_resolved_lines` ‚Äî Fetch every resolved task for ``slug`` and render its archive line.
- def `build_done_content` ‚Äî Render the full done-file body from ``lines``.
- def `render_dry_run` ‚Äî Format the ``--dry-run`` preview, framed with NO-CHANGES banners.

### `lithos_loom.cli.develop`
- class `RunInfo` ‚Äî A story-develop run discovered on disk.
- class `ContainerStatus`
- def `develop_list` ‚Äî List inspectable story-develop runs (in-flight + failed/interrupted).
- def `develop_prune` ‚Äî Remove the on-disk run-state dirs of **finished** story-develop runs.
- def `develop_dump` ‚Äî Print the assembled conversation log for a run (finished or in-flight).
- def `develop_attach` ‚Äî Follow a live run until it reaches a **terminal state**, printing handoffs as they land plus the current round + active agent, then a one-line outcome summary. Following keys on terminal state, not agent liveness, so it spans both the startup window before the first container and the commit / test-gate / teardown after the last agent turn, grace-polling through the window where the plugin has stopped its containers but not yet written the outcome. An **approved** verdict is not yet the end in daemon mode ‚Äî PR delivery (push + Copilot round + ``result.json``) runs after the dialogue approves, shown as a distinct "delivering PR‚Ä¶" phase ‚Äî so attach follows through it instead of exiting early. If the work dir is reaped on success before a poll observes the result, the outcome is recovered from the plugin's completion store. Read-only; ``Ctrl-C`` exits cleanly. When docker is unavailable it still follows the handoff files (active agent shows as ``‚Äî``).

### `lithos_loom.cli.obsidian_sync`
- def `show` ‚Äî Print the resolved ``[obsidian_sync]`` block from the active config.

### `lithos_loom.cli.project`
- def `project_list` ‚Äî List projects with their Lithos-canonical status + TOML-local overlay.
- def `project_create` ‚Äî Create a new Lithos project-context doc.
- def `project_import` ‚Äî Import a local Markdown file as a Lithos project ‚Äî including its open tasks.
- def `project_regenerate_done` ‚Äî Rebuild a project's task-archive done file from Lithos.
- def `project_add_github_repo` ‚Äî Map a GitHub repo to a Lithos project for the issue watcher.
- def `project_remove_github_repo` ‚Äî Unmap a GitHub repo from a Lithos project.
- def `project_enable_github` ‚Äî Turn on the issue watcher for a project.
- def `project_disable_github` ‚Äî Pause the issue watcher for a project without losing the repo mapping.
- def `project_migrate_github_tags` ‚Äî One-shot migration of legacy github-watcher *tags* ‚Üí metadata.

### `lithos_loom.cli.review`
- def `review_command` ‚Äî Run the reviewer panel + deterministic gate against an existing change.

### `lithos_loom.cli.task`
- class `UnknownProjectError` ‚Äî `--project` matched neither a Lithos project-context doc nor a local `[projects]` entry. Carries the offending slug + the sorted set of known slugs so the CLI can render a helpful exit-2 message.
- def `task_create` ‚Äî Create a Lithos task and emit its projected line.
